---
title: 'I am a WRITER!'
date: '2014-01-20T07:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8207038607105763860'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/i-am-writer.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Keys To Success'
---

<br /><h3 style="text-align: center;">WRITER</h3><h4>I am a writer:</h4><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: right; margin-left: 1em; text-align: right;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/writer-d3823b143a3a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="Picture of books I've been reading on writing. " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/writer-d3823b143a3a.jpg" height="320" title="Picture of books I've been reading on writing. Writing Fiction for Dummies, How to write science fiction, fiction writers workshop, literary terms a dictionary, and Tedd Dekker's &quot;Saint&quot;" width="239" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Books in my Tiny Office</td></tr></tbody></table>Yesterday was incredible! I received revelation and clarity for 2014. I AM A WRITER!&nbsp;<a href="http://goinswriter.com/" target="_blank">Jeff Goins</a>&nbsp;talks about making that declaration being the most revolutionary part of his career. Everything changed when he decided that. It's amazing what clarity will do for you.<br /><br />I was being torn between what I was becoming passionate about and what I thought I was supposed to be doing. For years everyone has told me that I should be a musician and in audio mixing. I pursued that career this year. I even took an audio course. I know that is still part of my calling. Music and Audio is in there somewhere. But it's not my focus for 2014. I am a writer. I'm going to explore that solely this year.<br /><br />The moment of realization hit me when my wife, who has always seen more in me than I see in myself turned to me pointed out that even during my audio class I didn't talk about it. I didn't read the books and find new books and get "into it". It was mostly focused on one day a week. But at the same time all semester I WAS really getting into writing books, blogging books, two Podcasts on becoming a better writer and Blogger and more successful online business.<br /><br />The book I read the most in the last month was&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/0470530707/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=0470530707&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Writing Fiction For Dummies</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=0470530707" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" />. It kept repeating this theme that resonated with me. Fiction is about creating a powerful emotional experience. Everything we do in life is this way. We live life as an emotional experience, primarily. What would a movie be without Music? Why? It creates a powerful emotional experience. Story is this way too. We live life as a story, and we retell the past, and forecast the future as a story.<br /><h4>Lessons to Learn:</h4>Sometimes it's hard to be self aware of what your real passions are and what you feel your "ought to be" passionate about, but aren't. To find your passion:<br /><ol><li>What do you do, when you have nothing to do... what do you find to do without trying?</li><li>When you have the opportunity to find a new book, blog post, project, music, song, podcast... what do you gravitate towards?</li><li>When you are still... what do you think about naturally?</li></ol><h4>Update: I needed to add <a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OZhUvZgYvX0" target="_blank">this video</a>. You need to see this!&nbsp;</h4><div style="text-align: center;"><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="//www.youtube.com/embed/OZhUvZgYvX0" width="560"></iframe> </div><h4></h4><h4>What are YOU passionate about?</h4><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">______________________________________________</span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;"><br /></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">Published Â© Darrell G. Wolfe&nbsp;</span><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; line-height: 16.363636016845703px; text-decoration: none;">http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/connect.html" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; line-height: 16.363636016845703px; text-decoration: none;">Connect</a><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">&nbsp;</span></li></ul><ul><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1" style="text-align: right;"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-63d42e008cf7.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><span style="text-align: right;"></span><span style="text-align: right;"></span><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" style="text-align: right;"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-77bfad54d6ab.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><span style="text-align: right;"></span><span style="text-align: right;"></span><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe" style="text-align: right;"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-320178b5d829.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><span style="text-align: right;"></span><span style="text-align: right;"></span><span style="text-align: right;"></span><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/DarrellWolfe" rel="alternate" style="text-align: right;" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-6448ae47be33.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><span style="text-align: right;">&nbsp;</span></li></ul><br /><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">I'd love to hear from you on this.&nbsp;</span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;"><br /></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">What thoughts or comments could you add to this topic?</span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;"><br /></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;"><br /></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 16.363636016845703px;"><br /></span><br /><div id="disqus_thread"></div><a class="dsq-brlink" href="http://disqus.com/">comments powered by&nbsp;<span class="logo-disqus">Disqus</span></a><br /><br /><br />&nbsp;__________________________________
